patches.title: Keep launch package generation local-only and evidence-linked
patches.problem: Launch readiness can be overclaimed if copy, privacy, pricing, screenshots, and TestFlight checklist are bundled into prose only.
patches.proposedChange: Require separate launch artifacts and evidence-linked claims before any ready-for-human-review verdict.
patches.expectedBenefit: Prevents generic handoff docs from hiding missing local launch evidence.
patches.risk: May add schema overhead before the pipeline has enough generated app data.
applicationPlan: Review this patch after the next proof app.
If approved, add the rule to final audit and gate prompts.
